name: Angel Shrimp Scampi
recipeIngredient: 12 large green shrimp, peeled with tails
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first seven ingredients in a bowl.
2. Marinate the shrimp overnight in the mixture.
3. Remove the shrimp from the marinade and roll them up, still unwashed.
4. Place the shrimp on a serving platter.
5. Drizzle melted butter over the shrimp.
6. Add the remaining marinade to the bottom of a broiler pan.
7. Broil slowly on low heat until the shrimp are cooked through.
Note: Use Tabasco sauce in place of pepper for better flavor with other ingredients. Only use white breadcrumbs; brown crumbs or crusts will burn too quickly during cooking. Alternatively, sauté the shrimp in half butter and half oil. When done, remove from the skillet, reduce the marinade in the skillet, pour over the shrimp, and serve.
